symbols: small rowing boat — the humble vessel of the working fisherman, evoking the boats of the Sea of Galilee disciples
calm waters — peace, stillness, and the quietude before divine encounter
mist — the veil between the visible and the unseen, the threshold of revelation
solitary rower — the individual laborer on the waters, recalling the disciples fishing before Christ's call
distant ship — the larger vessel barely visible through haze, suggesting the far horizon of journey and providence
description: A solitary figure sits in a small dark wooden rowing boat on a wide, calm body of water. The man wears a dark cap and blue-grey clothing and grips a pair of oars, mid-stroke, sending gentle ripples and green reflections across the glassy surface. The water is pale and luminous, reflecting soft light from an overcast sky. In the far background, partially obscured by mist, a larger vessel with masts is barely discernible. A dark landmass or headland emerges faintly on the right edge. The overall palette is cool grey-blue-green with a pearlescent quality to the light.
